name: Air-Popped Popcorn

pros.title: useful staple energy source
pros.explanation: That matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets.

pros.title: works as a meal anchor
pros.explanation: A lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

pros.title: can keep meals cheap and steady
pros.explanation: That is a genuine category strength.

cons.title: quality can drop fast with processing
cons.explanation: The grain category punishes refinement pretty hard.

cons.title: easy to overshoot portions
cons.explanation: Staple carbs can pile up fast without much friction.

cons.title: needs strong pairings to feel complete
cons.explanation: The grain rarely finishes the nutrition job alone.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
